battleTraits.name: Fast as Frazzlegit
battleTraits.description: Friendly units can charge after retreating. Units do not take mortal damage when retreating.

regimentAbilities.name: Great Snarlin Howl
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit with mounts. Add +1 to Attacks and +1 to Rend for mount weapons until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Careening Destruction
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly mounted unit. Move through an enemy unit. Roll a die for each model passed over. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage.
